item.title: I don’t know you
item.description: That’s my purse! Sorry for the stolen terrible crop job
item.dc:creator: LesbianRedwings

item.title: my dad makes cakes. thought I’d show them off…
item.description:
Orange and hazelnut entremet.
Chocolate, lemon mini-pastries with a touch of coffee.
“Simple” fruit and almond entremet.
Chocolate mousse entremet with lemon-yuzu marmalade.
Chocolate mousse, mango, pineapple, and hazelnut entremet.
Pistachio and sour cherry mini-pastries. Yes, they are every bit as good as they look. No, he has absolutely nothing to sell or promote. He has a full time job he very much enjoys, this is just his hobby and he wants to see what people think. https://instagram.com/anatoliy500 if you want to see what he comes up with next… (edit: added proper Instagram link)
item.dc:creator: neutronfish

item.title: This is so cool!
item.description: https://nypost.com/2022/06/09/wwe-star-john-cena-meets-teen-misha-rohozhyn-with-down-syndrome-who-fled-ukraine-during-war/ https://www.dailymail.co.uk/tvshowbiz/article-10895279/John-Cena-meets-Ukrainian-teen-syndrome-fled-country-wake-Russian-invasion.html https://www.wrestlinginc.com/news/2022/06/john-cena-meets-disabled-teen-refugee-from-ukraine/
item.dc:creator: mfrybeasley

item.title: I know you can easily look them up online and watch them in full - that's not the point.
item.description: These hearings may be the most consequential Congressional hearings in the history of our country, and so many people are tuned out & apathetic, that the only way you're going to get them to watch any, is by presenting it as an entertainment option on a platform they're already looking at, to be entertained. (Yes, it's sad that that's where we are as a country. But that IS where we are, so it's probably best to work within the confines of that reality.) It doesn't do much good to air (some of) the hearings on primetime TV, if a huge contingent of people don't ever watch TV. I think doing something like this, could help increase the number of people who see it - I hope those companies consider doing it.
item.dc:creator: ButtersTheCat

I'm an adult
I'm high as fuck
I'm in my prime
I'm too old for this shit
I'm your Huckleberry

poc poc poc
shy

suspicious
This is fine
I'm a unitard
wait what
wink

item.title: “That dance is a crime”
item.dc:creator: reservatio

item.title: "Schurr’s bodycam footage was deactivated during the incident"...Because of COURSE it fucking was!
item.description: You shut off your bodycam? Instant Jail, all crimes of the suspect are dropped, any damage or harm to person or property during said incident will be paid by the officer charged. Full Stop. You want to walk around with complete immunity and a weapon? You want to stalk our citizens with a requirement of around 6 WEEKS of training at best? You want to parade your ego around in an oppressive uniform having absolutely no consequence for your corruption? Then you LEAVE the fucking CAMERAS ON at ALL TIMES. I don't care if you're taking a piss. We can blur out faces, I'm sure we can blur out your lil' nightstick too. If there hadn't been external sources of video showing the incident this would have been an entirely different outcome and he would have gotten away with murder. As it stands, there might actually be some consequence for this piece of shit. https://www.yahoo.com/entertainment/michigan-officer-killed-black-driver-211257614.html - Source #acab #surprisesurprisenotsurprised #leavethecameraon
item.dc:creator: PunJedi
